issue_assignment.task_prompt: Work the assigned issue and request clarification when context is insufficient.

mention_response.task_prompt: Thanks for the mention on {entity_key}. I have started processing this request and will follow up here.

issue_clarification.task_prompt: I need more context to proceed on {entity_key}. Please share clear acceptance criteria, expected outcome, and any constraints.

reviewer_follow_up.task_prompt: Reviewer follow-up for {entity_key}: I have reviewed the latest updates and posted the next review outcome.

pr_follow_up.task_prompt: Follow-up for {entity_key}: I am processing the latest pull request feedback and check status updates and will report progress here.
